name: Very Easy French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread diagonally into triangles and arrange on a cookie sheet.
2. Combine all other ingredients with a hand blender or whisk. Pour over the bread and allow to stand for 5 to 30 minutes, allowing the bread to absorb the liquid.
3. Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Once hot, place the bread in the skillet. Cook until the bottom turns golden brown and slightly crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side. Flip once.
